form:Form.name: NucleusWF.Base.Ejecucion.Formularios.ShowForm.form

qry:select.name: ORGANIGRAMA
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL('
select org2.oi_organigrama, ins.c_estructura, ins.d_owner, th.oi_node from wrk02_threads as th, wrk02_instances as ins, wrk01_wf as wf, wrk05_organigramas as org1, wrk05_organigramas as org2 join th.oi_instance INNER ins.oi_instance, ins.oi_wf INNER wf.oi_wf, wf.oi_organigrama INNER org1.oi_organigrama where th.oi_thread = {#SOURCE:@oi_thread} and org1.c_organigrama = org2.c_organigrama and org1.e_version_pub = org2.e_version
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: ROLES_PUEDEN
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select T.oi_thread, N.c_rol, N.d_rol_delega from wrk02_threads as T, WRK01_ROLES_NODE as N join T.oi_node inner N.oi_node where T.oi_thread={%= $SOURCE/@oi_thread %} and N.c_rol=\'{%= $SOURCE/@c_rol_etty %}\' and N.c_puede_deleg!=\'NO\'
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: ROL
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select R.c_role, R.d_role, R.l_unique from WRK05_ROLES as R where R.oi_organigrama={%= $DATAIN/@oi_organigrama %} and R.c_role=\'{%= $SOURCE/@value%}\'
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: ESTRUCTURA
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select S.c_estructura, S.d_estructura, S.c_role from WRK05_ESTRUCTURA as S where S.oi_organigrama={%= $DATAIN/@oi_organigrama %} and S.c_role=\'{%=$SOURCE/@c_role%}\'
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: ESTRUCTURA_LIST
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select S.d_estructura, S.c_estructura, S.c_role from WRK05_ESTRUCTURA as S, WRK05_ESTRUCTURA as SP, WRK05_ESTR_ESTR as SR, WRK05_ENTIDAD_ESTR as SE
join SP.oi_estructura inner SE.oi_estructura, SP.oi_estructura inner SR.oi_estructura, S.c_estructura inner SR.c_estructura
where SE.oi_entidad=\'{%=$SOURCE/@ETTY%}\' and SP.oi_organigrama={%= $SOURCE/@oi_organigrama %} and S.oi_organigrama={%= $SOURCE/@oi_organigrama %} and S.c_role=\'{%=$SOURCE/@ID%}\' group by S.d_estructura, S.c_estructura, S.c_role
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: ENTIDAD_LIST
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select e.oi_entidad, E.d_entidad_estr from WRK05_ESTRUCTURA as S, WRK05_ENTIDAD_ESTR as E join S.oi_estructura inner E.oi_estructura where S.oi_organigrama={%= $SOURCE/@oi_organigrama %} and S.c_estructura=\'{%=$SOURCE/@ID%}\'
')/ROWS/ROW
